economic_notes: Subsequent to year end, the First Nation established WFN Seafoods Limited Partnership to acquire an interest in a limited partnership holding A&L Seafoods Limited, secured by a $27,000,000 loan guaranteed by the First Nation. Business enterprises include Breton Air Inc. (37.5%), Kitpu Aviation Inc. (50%), E'sukutimkewey Limited Partnership (5.4%), WFN Kitpu Aviation Inc. (100%), WFN Kitpu Aviation Limited Partnership (99.99%). Economic activities include gas bar, tobacco shop, fisheries (treaty and commercial), gaming, and Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex.
notes: Auditor name not included in the extracted text. Net financial assets is negative (net debt position) of $5,727,058. Consolidated entities include Wagmatcook Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex, Wagmatcook Education Authority Limited, and trust funds. Five business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Significant subsequent event: $27,000,000 loan secured post year-end for WFN Seafoods Limited Partnership acquisition of interest in A&L Seafoods Limited, guaranteed by the First Nation. New revenue standard PS 3400 adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively. Intangible assets of $14,395,680 represent fishing licenses not amortized. expenses_enterprises calculated as sum of Fisheries treaty ($214,816) + Fisheries commercial ($4,061,265) + Gas Bar ($4,554,363) + Gaming ($645,358) + Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex ($1,767,688) + Tobacco ($1,408,925) = $12,652,415; governance shown under expenses_administration. OSR calculated as total revenue $33,456,326 minus total government transfers $18,857,990 = $14,598,336.
